THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO DISMISS THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AND NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)
